hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *.db ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *.sqlite3 ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secrets or database files' >&2; exit 2; fi

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == */backend/* ]] && [[ "$filepath" == *.py ]]; then cd /Users/bany1111/local-workspace/daily-scheduler/backend && uv run ruff format "$filepath" && uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" && uv run pyrefly check "$filepath" --warn "implicit-any,unannotated-return"; elif [[ "$filepath" == */frontend/* ]] && [[ "$filepath" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then cd /Users/bany1111/local-workspace/daily-scheduler/frontend && npx oxlint "$filepath"; fi
